This '''individual''' was a [[Rutian/Legends|Rutian]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
This [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] fought alongside the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. During battle on an unknown [[Planet/Legends|planet]] between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], she was assigned to a battlefront under the leadership of Councilor [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]]. Joined by recently knighted [[Rivi-Anu]] and [[Eon]], the group fought valiantly to repel the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]]. When a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Victory-class Star Destroyer]] plummeted toward the battlefield, they all believed they would die, until Rivi-Anu [[Telekinesis/Legends|held back]] the warship with an astounding display of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Rivi-Anu waited until all Jedi and clones had fled the field, including this Twi'lek Jedi, and then allowed the ship to crash down upon herself.<ref name="TTVP" />
